class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>右<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">biɑn</rt></ruby>。<ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">shǐ</rt></ruby>

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>承<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>既<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>更<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>尊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zūn</rt></ruby><ruby>贵<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>超<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chāo</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǐ</rt></ruby>。
所Suǒ有yǒu的de天tiān使shǐ，神Shén从cónɡ来lái对duì哪nǎ一yí个ɡè说shuō，“你Nǐ是shì我wǒ的de儿ér子zi，我wǒ今jīn日rì生shēnɡ你nǐ”？又Yòu指zhǐ着zhe哪nǎ一yí个ɡè说shuō，“我Wǒ要yào作zuò他tā的de父fù，他tā要yào作zuò我wǒ的de子zi”？

<ruby>再<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zài</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhě</rt></ruby>，<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>长<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hou</rt></ruby>(<ruby>或<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huò</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby>“<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>再<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>长<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hou</rt></ruby>”)，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhě</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>拜<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Lùn</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhě</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>风<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhě</rt></ruby>，<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>火<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>焰<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yàn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>仆<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>役<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Lùn</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">què</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>宝<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>座<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>永<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>永<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>国<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuó</rt></ruby><ruby>权<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">quán</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>正<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>直<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhí</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>喜<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>公<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>义<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>恨<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hèn</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">è</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">è</rt></ruby>，<ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>喜<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>乐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuè</rt></ruby><ruby>油<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yóu</rt></ruby><ruby>膏<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>胜<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>膏<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>伴<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bàn</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>初<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>立<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>根<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡēn</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>手<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>灭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">miè</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mò</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">què</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>长<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>存<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cún</rt></ruby>；<ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fu</rt></ruby><ruby>渐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>渐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>旧<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Jì</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>礼<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>赎<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shú</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>喜<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>欢<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>(<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>按<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>律<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǜ</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>)。”

<ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>照<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhào</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>旨<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xínɡ</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Kě</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>除<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chú</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qù</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiān</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>立<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>定<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>凭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">pínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>旨<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>靠<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kào</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>只<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>次<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shēn</rt></ruby><ruby>体<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shènɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>站<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhàn</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>侍<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>奉<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>屡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>次<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>永<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>除<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chú</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>次<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>永<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>赎<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shú</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>右<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">biɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>坐<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>等<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">děnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>仇<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chóu</rt></ruby><ruby>敌<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dí</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>脚<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>凳<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dènɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>次<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>便<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>永<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>完<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wán</rt></ruby><ruby>全<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">quán</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>灵<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">línɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>既<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡuò</rt></ruby>

“<ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>，<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>些<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiē</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hòu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>立<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>律<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǜ</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>写<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>放<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">miàn</rt></ruby>”；

<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>再<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>记<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>念<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">niɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>愆<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qiān</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>犯<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fàn</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>些<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiē</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>既<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>赦<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shè</rt></ruby><ruby>免<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">miǎn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>再<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby>。<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>变<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">de</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>力<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">lì</rt></ruby>

<ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>既<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>血<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiě</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>坦<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>然<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rán</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>入<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rù</rt></ruby><ruby>至<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhì</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby>，
